calls.context: root should stay clean; tools can fetch one pretty-printed index from the devlog state directory

notes.text: Added pytest coverage for v0.2.0 CLI behavior: init, goals, logs, decisions, blockers, handoff, standup, validate, export, and git commits
Expanded v0.2.0 test suite to 23 tests with coverage reporting, 95.28% total coverage, CI workflow, and obsolete Markdown parser removal
Switched CLI and tests to v0.3.0 final command paradigm with note/call/calls/snag/clear/brief/log/orient plus shift, arch, constraint, and debt
